title: agent-redline boundary-violations report v1
description: Schema for the json-violations output format. An adapter (in an extension's scripts/ directory or built into the boundary-rule backend itself) emits a file matching this schema; the reporter ingests it via --boundary-format json-violations. See docs/EXTENSIONS.md § 'Backends without machine-readable output' for the pattern.

version.description: Schema version. Currently must be 1. Optional for v1 producers; required when the schema introduces a non-additive change.

source.description: Identifier of the boundary-rule backend that produced this report (e.g. 'import-linter', 'archunit', 'dependency-cruiser'). Surfaced in the PR comment.

violations.description: Each entry is one boundary-rule violation. Empty array means the backend ran cleanly.

rule.description: The contract / rule name from the backend (e.g. the import-linter contract name, the ArchUnit @ArchTest method name).

detail.description: Human-readable description of the specific violation. Single line; concrete (which import / which class).

severity.description: Reporter currently treats both as boundary-violations; severity is recorded for future use.
